message:
refactor: consolidate duplicated utility functions (bd-1zatu)

Move provider_ids_match and split_provider_model_spec to
provider_metadata.rs, and make model_requires_configured_credential
and model_entry_is_ready pub(crate) in models.rs, eliminating 4
duplicate function definitions across app.rs, rpc.rs, and
interactive/commands.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
